description_long: This is a sleek, modern Dell laptop with a matte black finish and a subtle carbon fiber texture on the lid. The lid features a centered, circular Dell logo in silver, providing a distinct brand identity. The laptop is partially open, revealing a backlit keyboard and a large touchpad, with a thin bezel display showing a vibrant desktop wallpaper. The edges are sharply defined, and the overall build appears slim and lightweight, typical of high-end ultrabooks. The visible ports are located along the sides, though only a few are discernible from these angles. The design is minimalist, with no visible stickers or extraneous markings, emphasizing a professional and premium aesthetic.
description: A slim, matte black Dell laptop with a carbon fiber-textured lid, silver Dell logo, and a partially open display showing a vibrant screen. The design is minimalist and professional, with a backlit keyboard and large touchpad visible.
description_view_0: Front view showing the partially open laptop with the display on, revealing the keyboard and touchpad.
description_view_1: Angled rear-left view highlighting the matte black lid, Dell logo, and the slim profile of the laptop.
description_view_2: Top-down view of the closed lid, prominently displaying the carbon fiber texture and centered Dell logo.
description_view_3: Angled rear-right view showing the lid, logo, and a glimpse of the side ports and keyboard.
attribute_brand_logo: A circular silver Dell logo is centered on the laptop lid, featuring the word 'DELL' in stylized uppercase letters.
attribute_screen_state: The screen is partially open and turned on, displaying a desktop wallpaper with vibrant colors.
attribute_keyboard_layout: QWERTY layout with a function row; no numeric keypad is visible.
